factPolicy.clayChemistryRule: Noord-Holland clay chemistry is not marked measured unless a source contains location, depth, method, and composition values.
factPolicy.enrichmentRule: Numeric enrichment versus Noord-Holland clay remains locked until measured clay composition records are attached.
factPolicy.massBalanceRule: Noord-Holland clay mass balances are stored as 1000 kg dry-basis templates per location/depth. They are not chemical mass balances until measured oxide, trace, LOI/moisture and residual terms are attached and close to 100 wt%.

originTrail.publishBlocker: No live OriginTrail DKG node credentials/config were present in the workspace during this update.
originTrail.localIdentityRule: sha256 over stable JSON with cid/ual fields excluded in this static release; a live Knitweb/OriginTrail publisher can replace it with canonical CBOR CID while preserving record payloads.
originTrail.sourceAuthorLinking: Sources carry author/creator/publisher fields and records link to sourceIds.

sources.title: SmartSlag KIVI voordracht / technisch dossier Plant One
sources.note: Operator-curated local source. Batch-specific assay certificates should supersede this range for regulated reporting.

sources.title: Chemical, Mineralogical, and Morphological Properties of Steel Slag
sources.note: Used as general steel slag literature support; local Tata IJmuiden batches still require direct assay.

sources.title: GeoTOP (GTM)
sources.creator: Rijkswaterstaat
sources.publisher: Basisregistratie Ondergrond / Ministerie van Volkshuisvesting en Ruimtelijke Ordening
sources.note: GeoTOP gives subsurface lithology in 100 x 100 x 0.5 m voxels to max 50 m below NAP; it is not an oxide chemistry assay source.

sources.title: Mineral Commodity Summaries 2026: Vanadium
sources.note: Used for market context only, not for local BOF or clay composition.

sources.title: Regulation (EU) 2024/1252 establishing a framework for ensuring a secure and sustainable supply of critical raw materials
sources.publisher: Official Journal of the European Union

site.name: Tata Steel IJmuiden / SLAG Plant One feedstock reference

records.unitPolicy: Major oxides are stored as wt_pct_basis_points where 100 bp = 1 wt%; trace scandium as ppm_mg_per_kg.

provenance.factBoundary: Not a batch assay certificate; use as engineering range only.

records.comparisonUse: Use this record as a location/depth mass-balance template only; do not calculate numeric enrichment until lab XRF/ICP values and dry-basis closure are attached.
records.missingCompositionReason: The attached public source supports lithology/depth modelling, not measured oxide or trace-element chemistry for this named location/depth.

variables.label: Noord-Hollandse klei droge-massabasis
variables.note: Applies to each Noord-Holland clay location/depth template until measured lab composition closes the balance.

variables.label: Klei massabalans sluiting vereist
variables.note: Numeric enrichment requires oxide, trace, LOI/moisture and residual terms that close to 100 wt% dry basis.

variables.label: Verrijkingsfactor vergrendeld
variables.note: The BOF/clay comparison may show structural mass-balance coverage, but not numeric enrichment.

comparisons.availableConclusion: BOF-slag has source-linked oxide ranges and a 1000 kg dry-basis reference mass balance. Noord-Holland clay now has 1000 kg dry-basis mass-balance templates for each listed location/depth, but measured clay chemistry is still absent, so numeric enrichment factors remain locked.
requiredBeforeUnlock: Attach location coordinates or boring/sample id
Attach LOI/moisture/residual terms and close the dry-basis mass balance

basis.note: Range conversion from stored BOF composition values; independent component ranges do not represent one closed assay.

rangeClosure.closureNote: Minimum and maximum component ranges are independent literature/operator ranges; they should not be interpreted as a single closed 1000 kg batch.

provenance.factBoundary: Computed conversion of existing source ranges to kg per tonne; not a new measurement.

basis.note: Planning basis for comparing one tonne dry clay sampling target with one tonne BOF slag; not a measured oxide total.

chemicalClosure.closureRule: Measured oxide wt_pct plus LOI/moisture/residual terms must close to 100 wt% dry basis before numeric enrichment is unlocked.
